advances.label: Number of Advances
advances.description: Number of times the skip pattern shifts position over the effect duration. Higher values make the pattern appear to march along the strand.

bandSize.label: Band size
bandSize.description: Number of consecutive lit pixels in each colored band of the skip pattern.

chaseSize.label: Chase Size
chaseSize.description: Length of each lit chase segment as a percentage of the total strand length.

chaseType.label: Chase Types
chaseType.description: Direction and movement pattern of the chase. Bounce types reverse at edges, Dual runs two chases simultaneously, Static types display without motion, and Middle types expand or contract from the center.

cycles.label: Cycles
cycles.description: Number of complete chase traversals over the effect duration. Higher values make the chase move faster.

fadeType.label: Fade
fadeType.description: Applies a brightness fade to the chase segment. 'From Head' fades from the leading edge, 'From Tail' from the trailing edge, 'Head and Tail' fades both ends, and 'Middle' fades from the center outward.

intensity.label: Intensity
intensity.description: Controls the intensity parameter of the selected FX animation. Its exact meaning varies by effect (e.g., brightness, size, or density).

mode.label: Colors
mode.description: Selects the color source for the chase. Palette uses the user-defined palette colors; Rainbow cycles through all hues automatically.

numberChases.label: Number Chases
numberChases.description: Number of simultaneous chase segments running across the strand.

skipSize.label: Skip size
skipSize.description: Number of unlit (dark) pixels between each colored band. Set to 0 for no gaps.

registryDefinition.notes: Primary motion-pattern effect. Mode and geometry profile materially change which parameters matter.
